strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React production work (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Hands-on AI agent development experience — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Deep testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus authored test tooling and taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere in the résumé
Kotlin absent and Java exposure is dated/peripheral (robotic arms at Altom, 2016-2018), weak against the secondary stack
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not named specifically; testing expertise is demonstrated largely in D-language tooling

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and weak Kotlin/Java evidence

response.justification: The role's core competencies are TypeScript/Node/React fullstack delivery, testing rigor, cloud/containerization, databases, and AI agent development. The candidate shows concrete evidence on nearly all: TypeScript/React/MongoDB/AWS CDK at Optilyz, TDD and CI/CD at RIDE, Kubernetes deployment for GISCollective, and MCP/agentic tooling at re:cinq — a rare direct hit on the AI agent requirement. He holds a CS degree and far exceeds the 6+ year bar. Gaps are narrow: Nest.js is not evidenced, Kotlin is absent with only older Java work, and the named test frameworks (Vitest/Jest/Playwright) are not cited, though his testing pedigree suggests fast ramp-up. Evidence strongly supports fit for the primary stack with minor secondary-stack risk.
